title: anomoctenium stipulare
intro: Anomoctenium stipulare is a plant species, also known as Stipule Tree, that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. The plant is reported to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Anomoctenium stipulare include treating intestinal parasites, reducing inflammation, and alleviating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used in the form of infusions or decoctions, and it's also used in some traditional remedies to treat fever and skin conditions.
